nasb.text: “Son of man, I have appointed you a watchman to the house of Israel; whenever you hear a word from My mouth, warn them from Me.

esv.text: “Son of man, I have made you a watchman for the house of Israel. Whenever you hear a word from my mouth, you shall give them warning from me.

cnv.text: “人子啊，我立了你作以色列家守望的人，所以你要聆聽我口中的話，替我警告他們。

ccb.text: “人子啊，我立你做以色列人的守望者，你要把我告诫他们的话告诉他们。
